Off Calendar Sep-11-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF HORACIO CAMPOS' Motion To Dismiss The Case With Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to dismiss this case in full with prejudice is granted. The court has previously approved the settlement, which has been fully administered.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Continued To Mar-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: FINAL APPROVAL HEARING (PAGA SETTLEMENT).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

This is a final approval hearing on a PAGA settlement. On January 14, 2025, the court directed plaintiff's counsel to file a declaration re disposition of settlement proceeds and any other outstanding issues that may be discussed at the hearing no later than January 28, 2025. No declaration has been filed. The court continues the matter to March 26, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 301 and orders counsel to file the declaration on or before March 19, 2025 with a courtesy copy provided to Department 301 within 24 hours of filing.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

ALEXEI N. OFFILL-KLEIN, Esq., CASTILLO, MORIARTY, TRAN & ROBINSON LLP, (415) 213-4098, for Defendants.

RE: PLAINTIFF HORACIO CAMPOS' Motion To Send A Belair Notice.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem Judge. The pro tem Judge and both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Ruling is argued. At conclusion of argument, the matter is continued to Discovery on Sep-28-2023 at 9:00 am for additional discussion.
